info.name: Hotel Booking API - Updated Current Backend
info.description:
Updated from base collection 🏨 Hotel Booking API — Full Collection.postman_collection (1).json for the current Spring Boot backend. Includes auth, catalog, room inventory, photo URL/upload, booking lifecycle, payment retry, reviews, notifications, audit logs, admin, health, and analytics flows.

Deployment usage: keep baseUrl as http://localhost:8080 for local testing, or set baseUrl to the ALB DNS such as http://hotel-api-alb-123456.us-east-1.elb.amazonaws.com for ECS/Fargate testing.

exec: else if (pathOnly.startsWith('/api/manager') || pathOnly.includes('/confirm') || pathOnly.includes('/check-in') || pathOnly.includes('/check-out') || pathOnly.includes('/simulate')) { token = pm.collectionVariables.get('managerToken') || ''; }
function json() { try { return pm.response.json(); } catch (e) { return null; } }
function setIf(name, value) { if (value !== undefined && value !== null && value !== '') pm.collectionVariables.set(name, value); }
function firstWith(data, pred) { return arr(data).find(pred) || arr(data)[0]; }
if (/admin/i.test(name) || data.role === 'ADMIN') { setIf('adminToken', data.accessToken); setIf('adminRefreshToken', data.refreshToken); }
else if (/manager/i.test(name) || data.role === 'MANAGER') { setIf('managerToken', data.accessToken); setIf('managerRefreshToken', data.refreshToken); }
const pending = firstWith(data, u => u && (u.role === 'PENDING_MANAGER' || u.email === pm.collectionVariables.get('pendingManagerEmail')));
const guest = firstWith(data, u => u && (u.email === 'guest@hotel.com' || u.role === 'GUEST'));
if (url.includes('/api/hotels') && !url.includes('/reviews') && !url.includes('/room-types')) { const h = firstWith(data, x => x && x.id); if (h) setIf('hotelId', h.id); }
if (url.includes('/room-types') && !url.includes('/rooms') && !url.includes('/photos')) { const rt = firstWith(data, x => x && x.id); if (rt) setIf('roomTypeId', rt.id); }
if (url.includes('/rooms')) { const r = firstWith(data, x => x && x.id); if (r) setIf('roomId', r.id); }
if (url.includes('/api/bookings')) { const b = firstWith(data, x => x && x.id); if (b) { setIf('bookingId', b.id); setIf('roomId', b.roomId); } }

if (url.includes('/api/payments')) { const p = firstWith(data, x => x && x.id); if (p) { if (p.status === 'FAILED' || /failed/i.test(name)) setIf('failedPaymentId', p.id); else setIf('paymentId', p.id); } }
if (url.includes('/api/photos')) { const ph = firstWith(data, x => x && x.id); if (ph) setIf('photoId', ph.id); }
if (url.includes('/reviews')) { const rv = firstWith(data, x => x && x.id); if (rv) setIf('reviewId', rv.id); }
if (url.includes('/notifications')) { const n = firstWith(data, x => x && x.id); if (n) setIf('notificationId', n.id); }

if (url.includes('/audit-logs')) { const a = firstWith(data, x => x && x.id); if (a) { setIf('auditLogId', a.id); setIf('auditAction', a.action); setIf('auditTargetType', a.targetType); if (a.actorUserId) setIf('auditActorUserId', a.actorUserId); } }
pm.test('Response body is valid JSON when present', function () { if (pm.response.text()) pm.expect(function(){ pm.response.json(); }).not.to.throw(); });

variable.description: Change this to the ALB URL after ECS deployment, for example http://hotel-api-alb-123456.us-east-1.elb.amazonaws.com
Older EC2 fallback example. For required ECS/Fargate deployment, prefer albBaseUrlExample.
Example only. Copy this value into baseUrl when running against AWS ECS/Fargate.

request.description: Open this URL in a browser if Swagger is enabled. 404 means SWAGGER_ENABLED=false.
Optional. If you run this, log in guest again before continuing.

request.description: Manual step: in Postman, choose an actual JPEG/PNG/WEBP/GIF file for the form-data field named file before sending.
Deletes the last saved photoId. This is included because photo delete is part of the current API, but run carefully if you want to preserve photos.

exec: const j=pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.status).to.eql('CHECKED_IN'); pm.expect(j.roomId, 'roomId assigned').to.exist; pm.expect(j.roomNumber, 'roomNumber assigned').to.exist;

request.description: Current backend has no query search/filter parameters for admin users, so this repeats list users and scripts find users client-side.
Temporarily deactivates saved guestUserId. Next request reactivates it.

request.description: Dangerous cleanup request. Do not run in the main happy path unless you intentionally want to delete guestUserId.
